Pretend Helot is Uvhash. Ramona along with Uvhash will be the main DPS carries. You generally use Ramona exalt to search her 3 cost card since it scales after every use and does amazing damage. Ogier's wheel is the reroll shop card which is an extremely underrated utility option. Relics and utility wheels are generally going to give you more value because scaling low stat units in the early game doesn't do much. Can replace this for "Hope" if you find that you're taking tons of damage getting to the boss. Uvhash's wheel lets you use your posse without worry in every battle (except the first) which would make the battles much easier. Leigh's wheel gives you max hp after battle as a choice which scales with Caros nicely (specifically the furnace). You can use another utility wheel if you don't care much for it like "Active" which cleanse your symptom cards on rest areas. Can replace Leigh with Karen if you need more arthrimetica. For the posse, it's your preference

quick question how can i tell which card carry over to the next turn and which doesn't
cuz it's a bit confusing
Cards with "Retain" carry over.
Other cards do not.
"Retain" is a keyword for cards that get held to next turn (red color text on card). If the card has "Void" it'll always be discarded, regardless if it somehow has retain keyword or not
It'll say on the card if it does.
